race.comment: Another cracking race for our other feature, the Victoria Handicap. KING ZEPHYR (18) does need a couple of scratchings to sneak in but can make his presence felt if so. He pulled up with issues fresh over 1200m and is much better suited to this trip, albeit he'd prefer a bigger track. WROTE TO ARATAKI (7) was game in the G3 Tressady Stakes with 58kg last time against the mares, she drops sharply in the weights here and will take plenty of catching if she crosses. PERSIAN SPIRIT (6), HERE TO SHOCK (1) and CAFE MILLENIUM (2) all come through the G3 Shaftesbury Avenue at Flemington. PERSIAN SPIRIT ran well against the pattern which suited HERE TO SHOCK, but he'll map very well again. CAFE MILLENIUM will be trying to pick up the pieces late.
